title: AI-Driven Engineer (ML / Data / Backend) – Hybrid / Equity
description: Zylicon Technology olarak, şirketlerin operasyonlarını yapay zekâ ile optimize eden ürünler geliştiriyoruz. İstanbul Teknopark & BTM bünyesindeyiz. Şu anda 100+ müşteri pilot bekliyor. Yani fikir değil → doğrudan üretim aşamasındayız. Ne Arıyoruz? Unvan önemli değil. İş çıkaran insan arıyoruz. AI ile aktif olarak kod yazdıran (Lovable vb.) Prompt engineering’i gerçekten bilen (kopyala-yapıştır değil) “tek başına feature çıkarabilen” Hızlı MVP → test → iterasyon döngüsüne alışkın Sürekli yönlendirme beklemeyen Ne Yapacaksın? Mevcut ürünleri hızla geliştirip müşteriye ulaştırmak AI destekli sistemler kurmak (scoring, analiz, otomasyon vs.) Backend / data / ML tarafında direkt çıktı üretmek “Mükemmel sistem” değil → çalışan sistem kurmak Not: Teknik mimari ve üst seviye kararlar CTO tarafından yönetiliyor. Çalışma Modeli Hybrid (uzaktan + gerektiğinde İstanbul) Maaş odaklı değil → girişim odaklı İlk aşamada düşük / opsiyonel maaş Hisse opsiyonu Kazanç: yatırım turu veya satış sonrası Kimler Uygun Değil? Sadece verilen task’ı yapan AI kullanmadan klasik geliştirme yapan “Önce her şeyi tasarlayalım” diyen Kurumsal konfor arayan Neden Biz? 0’dan fikir değil → müşteri hazır 100+ aktif talep Ürünün kaderine direkt etki Gerçek startup temposu Başvuru DM veya LinkedIn üzerinden ulaş.

title: Full-Stack Developer PHP - Laravel Developer
description: Ofis Kültürünü benimsemiş Bakırköy Merkez ofiste görevlendirilmek üzere Full Stack PHP Developer arayışımız vardır. PHP ve Laravel ile en az +5 yıl tecrübeli sıfırdan proje geliştirmiş ve laravel projelere güncelleme geliştirme hata ayıklama yapabilecek çözüm odaklı uzun soluklu projelerde yer almış. uzun süre bir ekipte yer almak isteyen adayların başvurmasını rica ederiz. kurtulus@egelinebilgi.net

title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend / Full-Stack)
description: About Kopilot Kopilot is redefining how millions of students prepare for exams through AI-powered learning, personalized coaching, and viral social growth. Recently named “EdTech Startup of the Year,” Kopilot is building a next-generation education super app where students can learn, solve questions, join communities, get coaching, and have fun — all in one place. Our platform combines AI, data, and human coaching to create one of the fastest-growing education products in the region, and we are now preparing for global expansion. We are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer , reporting to the Head of Technology , who will play a key role in scaling our platform and evolving our system architecture as our product and user base grow rapidly. Role Overview As a Senior Software Engineer at Kopilot, you will help design and build scalable systems used by thousands of students every day. This role is backend-focused with full-stack capabilities . You will contribute to critical architectural decisions, improve system reliability and performance, and help evolve our platform toward a scalable architecture. You will collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and other engineers to deliver high-quality features quickly while maintaining strong engineering standards. Responsibilities System Transformation: Execute the migration of core business logic from a prototype environment to a structured NestJS & TypeScript backend. Architecture Implementation: Work within a Modular Monolith strategy to build clean, maintainable, and "ready-to-microservice" system components. Database Optimization: Design and maintain the data layer on Supabase (PostgreSQL), ensuring data integrity and performance. Infrastructure Execution: Implement the Cloud Native roadmap, managing containerization (Docker) and modern CI/CD workflows. Quality & Standards: Maintain system stability through automated testing, clear documentation, and adherence to established engineering rules. Velocity & AI: Use AI-assisted development tools (Cursor, Copilot, etc.) to maximize engineering velocity and automate repetitive tasks without compromising code quality. Requirements 7–10 years of software engineering experience (Open to 5+ years for candidates with strong startup scale-up or migration experience). Strong backend experience with Node.js, TypeScript, and NestJS. Solid understanding of RDBMS (PostgreSQL) and data integrity. Experience with Clean Architecture or Domain-Driven Design (DDD) principles. Familiarity with Cloud Native concepts (Docker and modern deployment workflows). Full-Stack capability (React or React Native) to support our unified product experience. Execution Mindset: A "builder" mentality focused on turning architectural designs into stable, production-ready reality. Hybrid-Ready: Ability to attend occasional in-person team meetups in Istanbul (approx. 3-4 times per month) while working primarily remote. Nice to Have Experience working in SaaS or consumer apps. Experience scaling high-growth startup products. Experience with cloud infrastructure and modern DevOps practices. Experience with AI-assisted development tools. Experience with React Native or mobile-first products. Why Kopilot? Build a category-defining EdTech super app. Work on products used by thousands of students every day. Join one of the fastest-growing startups in Turkey. Play a key role in shaping the architecture and engineering culture of the company. Be part of a global expansion journey. Work in a fast-moving startup environment with high ownership. Remote-first hybrid model — work from anywhere most of the time, with 3–4 in-person team meetups per month in our Istanbul office.

title: Frontend React Architect
description: About the Job Company Description OBSS is Turkey’s largest technology consultancy, pioneering product development and technology consulting for an AI-native future. With more than 20 years of experience and offices in Istanbul, Ankara, London, Amsterdam, and Baku, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, insurance, e-commerce, retail, and the start-up ecosystem. Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning. We are now looking for a Frontend React Architect to join us and contribute to building high-quality, end-to-end solutions that create real business impact. OBSS is looking for a Frontend React Architect to join our dynamic team and contribute to delivering end-to-end software solutions across diverse industries. You will work on cutting-edge projects, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain high-quality applications that solve real business problems. Main Responsibilities Lead the design and implementation of scalable, maintainable React-based architectures Establish and enforce best practices for component libraries, coding standards, and frontend architecture Mentor and guide frontend engineers on React patterns, state management, and testing strategies Drive technical decisions regarding frontend frameworks, build tools, and application performance optimizations Ensure high-quality, reusable, and efficient frontend code across multiple projects Promote knowledge sharing, code reviews, and continuous learning within the frontend team Qualifications / Technical Skills 9+ years of professional frontend development experience, including 5+ years focused on React Proven experience in the banking or financial services industry Expertise in ES6+, TypeScript, React Hooks, Context API, and modern build tools Proven track record with large-scale applications and CI/CD pipelines Strong collaboration skills with UX/UI and backend teams for API integration and feature delivery Excellent communication skills and a passion for mentoring and knowledge sharing Ability to approach AI with curiosity and intention, actively incorporating AI-powered tools into workflows to enhance productivity and drive innovation Additional Informations : Professional Growth & Learning As a tech company, we focus on reskilling and upskilling to support career growth. We offer a personalized Individual Growth Program (IGP), where employees set clear goals for each half of the year. These goals may include trainings, certifications, and personal development milestones, creating a structured roadmap for continuous improvement. The IGP helps employees strengthen both technical and soft skills, ensuring steady professional advancement. Company Culture and Values We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued. Benefits and Perks We provide competitive salaries, flexible and hybrid working arrangements, and a wide range of opportunities for growth through training programs, certifications, and workshops. In addition, we offer initiatives designed to build a supportive and engaging workplace where curiosity and collaboration are encouraged. These benefits ensure that employees feel motivated, empowered, and equipped to reach their full potential.

title: Tech Lead / Product Builder (Node.js + React)
description: Tech Lead / Product Builder (Node.js + React) Remote | Full-Time | Apply via Vertex Agility We’re not looking for coders. We’re looking for builders. Engineers who take ownership, shape products, and influence real decisions. The Role Step in as a hands-on Tech Lead with a true Product Builder mindset — someone who owns the journey from idea → architecture → production. You’ll lead from the front , make key technical decisions, and partner closely with stakeholders to deliver scalable, high-impact products . Tech Stack React (SPA) | Node.js | AWS | CI/CD | Microservices What You Bring Strong full-stack expertise (Node.js + React) Proven experience as a Tech Lead / Senior Engineer Ability to drive and influence architectural decisions Outstanding communication skills (this is critical) A mindset of ownership, accountability, and product thinking Why This Role Stands Out Build, don’t just maintain — real product ownership Influence decisions at architecture and product level Work on a modern, cloud-native AWS stack Collaborate with senior engineers & decision-makers

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: We’re building Reflow, a workforce and workflow intelligence platform that helps teams understand and improve how work gets done. We’re expanding our full-stack team to accelerate feature development, scale analytics systems, and ship the next wave of intelligence-driven capabilities. What you’ll do - Build and maintain core product features across frontend (Next.js) and backend (Django) stacks. - Design and implement analytics dashboards, data visualizations, and real-time reporting systems. - Own API design, optimization, and integration between our apps and backend services. - Ensure database performance and reliability, from schema design to query optimization. - Collaborate closely with product, design, and data teams to move quickly from concept to live feature. - Help shape development standards, best practices, and architecture for scalability. Who you are - Experienced in Django (Python) and Next.js (React), comfortable moving between backend and frontend. - Strong understanding of API architecture, data modeling, and performance tuning. - Proven ability to build analytics-heavy applications and make data usable, visual, and fast. - Pragmatic and fast-moving, you know how to deliver in an evolving product environment. - Opinionated about clean, maintainable code but flexible when shipping fast matters. Bonus points - Familiarity with data warehousing, ETL, or analytics pipeline concepts. - Experience in frontend performance optimization and responsive UI design. - Understanding of AI-driven or automation-based backend systems. Why join - You’ll be building at the intersection of data, intelligence, and product, turning massive workflow datasets into insights and automation. You’ll work directly with founders and the early team, shaping product architecture, development practices, and what performance intelligence means at scale. We’re open to full-time employment. High trust, high speed, and high impact. Compensation: We offer competitive pay based on the market and where you’re located. The salary ranges in our job postings are intentionally wide because they need to cover both U.S. and international candidates. Our final offer will depend on things like your experience, skill set, and location.

title: Backend/ Data Pipeline Engineer (Python Entry-Level)
description: We process data from 200,000+ employer career portals and major job boards, running large-scale scraping infrastructure, complex ETL pipelines, and ML enrichment models across billions of records. This is not a typical web app role. You will work directly with one of the largest job market datasets in the world: 900M+ unique postings, each enriched with 82 fields. What You Will Do Build and maintain web scraping systems that collect job postings from thousands of sources using Scrapy, Playwright, and custom crawlers. Design and optimize data processing pipelines that clean, deduplicate, and transform raw job postings into structured, enriched records. Work with our database layer across PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Aerospike, and ClickHouse, each serving a specific role in our data architecture. Write Python scripts and services for data ingestion, validation, and quality assurance across the pipeline. Deploy and monitor your work using Docker on cloud infrastructure (AWS, Google Cloud). Collaborate with ML engineers who build the NLP models that enrich the data you process. Who You Are You have a Master's degree (preferred) or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. You are proficient in Python, with experience writing production scripts, data processing code, or backend services. You are comfortable working in Linux/Unix environments and writing shell scripts. You have experience with at least two of: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, or another database system. You have some experience with web scraping (Scrapy, Playwright, Selenium, BeautifulSoup, or similar tools). You understand data formats (JSON, CSV, Parquet) and have worked with messy, real-world data. Nice to Have Experience with large-scale data pipelines or ETL systems. Familiarity with Docker and containerized deployments. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS or Google Cloud). Knowledge of asynchronous programming in Python (asyncio, aiohttp). Familiarity with message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka, or Redis queues). Experience with ClickHouse, Aerospike, or other specialized databases. Exposure to NLP, machine learning, or data enrichment workflows. Familiarity with Kubernetes.
